categories.name: Already in Dashboard
categories.description: Metrics currently available with live data

metrics.question: How do customers access the insights from each of the products (FFR, plaque, roadmap)?
metrics.description: Distribution of access methods across all products

metrics.question: Does the way they access our insights correlate with utilization of that product?
metrics.currentValue: Yes, UI users show 2.3x higher utilization
metrics.description: Correlation between access method and product utilization

metrics.question: Break into customer cohorts: OPIC vs. Hospital, Plaque vs. not, Employed referrers vs. private practice, and volume tiers: low, medium, high CT volume programs
metrics.description: Customer segmentation across multiple dimensions

metrics.question: What are the Plaque UR rates by disease (stenosis grade or CADRADS)?
metrics.description: Plaque utilization rates across disease severity grades

metrics.question: What proportion of patients get both FFRCT and Plaque? What is the disease burden of these patients?
metrics.description: Percentage of patients receiving both FFRCT and Plaque analysis

categories.name: Short-term Possibility (1 Month)
categories.description: Metrics achievable within the next month

metrics.question: Can we define superusers? People who are in the UI nearly every day, interact/view many cases? Is there unique utilization or growth at sites with super users vs. not?
metrics.description: Impact of power users on site growth and utilization

metrics.question: What percent of patients that do need an FFR or plaque based on the roadmap assessment do get the tests completed?
metrics.description: Conversion rate from roadmap recommendation to test completion

metrics.question: How often customers perform plaque right straight from caselist (plaque 'yes/no' visual) vs. run it after viewing roadmap vs. run it after performing FFR? Any impact on attachment rate?
metrics.description: Plaque ordering workflow patterns and their impact

metrics.question: What are the CCTA, Plaque and FFRCT utilization rate (growth % or n months from golive performance volume) differences between readers who view the FFRCT and Plaque 3D model routinely, and those who don't?
metrics.description: Impact of 3D model usage on overall utilization

categories.name: Blocked / Need X-functional Support
categories.description: Metrics requiring IT, Engineering, or CS team support

metrics.question: What percent of customers are consistent users (every week) vs. infrequent (every month or quarter) vs. lost (logged in but inactive for 2+ quarters) vs. never active (never completed account)?

blockedReason.description: Need IT support to pull user activity flag into database

metrics.description: User engagement patterns and retention metrics

metrics.question: What % of customers use each product?

blockedReason.description: Need support with enriching user profiles with product usage data

metrics.description: Product adoption rates across customer base

metrics.question: How much time do customers spend on 'value add' vs 'non-value add' tasks in each product? e.g. wait time on case list, searching for patients vs. interacting with plaque

blockedReason.description: Need IT support in pulling comprehensive list of events into Tableau dataset
blockedReason.requiredFrom: IT Data Team + Engineering for event tagging

metrics.description: Time allocation between productive and non-productive activities

metrics.question: What is the breakdown of time spent in the clinical UI per activity e.g. load time, caselist navigation, interacting with Roadmap, FFR, Plaque

blockedReason.description: Need IT support in pulling comprehensive list of events into Tableau dataset
blockedReason.requiredFrom: IT Data Team + Product for event categorization

metrics.description: Detailed breakdown of user time allocation in UI

metrics.question: Break down of all the above based on user type i.e. IC, gen card, reader (split by card vs. rad)

blockedReason.description: Need IT/Marketing Ops support in user profile enrichment with role information

metrics.description: User behavior segmented by clinical role

metrics.question: How often do customers access insights by role? Percent of cases they order viewed in each method? What percent of readers vs. ICs vs. referrers view every case that is relevant to them?

blockedReason.description: Need IT/Marketing Ops support for role-based analytics enrichment

metrics.description: Case viewing completeness by user role

metrics.question: What are the ordering rates for referring providers who view the FFRCT and Plaque reports, 3D model routinely?

blockedReason.description: Need IT to flag users as referring providers in the system

metrics.description: Ordering patterns of referring providers based on viewing behavior

metrics.question: % of customers who had access to our analyses (FFR, Roadmap, etc) when they click

blockedReason.description: Need IT to pull completed timestamp into our dataset for TAT calculation

metrics.description: Percentage of users who find results ready upon login

metrics.question: % of customers who run/view our analyses significantly after being available? (i.e. for what % of customers are we 'over-delivering on TAT'?)

blockedReason.description: Need IT to pull completed timestamp into dataset for delay analysis

metrics.currentValue: Sample: 42% view within hours, 35% within days
metrics.description: Time between result availability and customer viewing

metrics.question: What is the difference between customers who can perform and then view FFRct or Plaque immediately (within a few minutes) vs. those who wait hours/days after roadmap to perform and view? Is there utilization difference?

blockedReason.description: Need Roadmap viewed timestamp in Mixpanel

metrics.description: Impact of viewing delay on product utilization

metrics.question: What percent of CCTA orders are placed as conditional orders and what percent of the conditional orders don't get fulfilled by the reader?

blockedReason.description: Not available on the CS side either - needs new data collection

metrics.description: Conditional order patterns and fulfillment rates

metrics.question: Can we define frustration metrics or churn behavior? Do customers give up using the UI at some point? (Many clicks leading to nothing... long wait times and then no orders, etc... failed logins and then no activity) How often does that happen from all user sessions?

metadata.notes: Requires sophisticated event tracking and ML pattern detection

metrics.description: Detection of user frustration patterns and abandonment behavior

categories.name: Fundamental Limitation
categories.description: Metrics that are possibly never achievable due to technical constraints

metrics.question: Does the CCTA ordering rate change when referring providers have plaque access (enabled) vs. no plaque access?
metrics.currentValue: Not measurable - no CCTA ordering provider tracking

metadata.notes: No way of knowing the CCTA ordering provider today - fundamental system limitation

metrics.description: Impact of plaque access on CCTA ordering behavior - not currently trackable
